title: Luca's Garden Helper Day
synopsis: Luca feels nervous about his first day helping in the school garden, but with encouragement from his diverse classmates and teacher, he discovers the joy of planting seeds and watching them grow, transforming his worried feelings into excitement and pride.

pages.text: Luca walked slowly to school with his backpack bouncing. Today was Garden Day! All the children would plant seeds outside. But Luca felt nervous in his tummy.

illustration.description: A young Latino boy with curly dark hair and brown eyes walks along a sunny sidewalk, wearing a bright blue backpack and yellow t-shirt. His expression shows worry with slightly furrowed brows. Colorful houses line the street with blooming flowers in front yards. The style is cheerful cartoon with bold primary colors and rounded shapes.
illustration.alt: Luca walking to school looking nervous

pages.text: "What if I drop the seeds?" Luca whispered to himself. "What if the plants don't grow?" His hands felt shaky and his heart beat fast.

illustration.description: Close-up of Luca's worried face with wide brown eyes and a small frown. His hands are held up in front of him, slightly trembling. The background shows soft green and yellow colors suggesting a garden setting. His expression clearly shows nervous feelings with raised eyebrows.
illustration.alt: Luca looking worried with shaky hands

pages.text: In the garden, Luca saw his teacher Ms. Chen and his friends. Aisha had dark skin and wore purple overalls. Sam had freckles and a big smile. "Hi Luca!" they called happily.

illustration.description: A diverse group of preschoolers in a school garden with raised plant beds. Ms. Chen, an Asian woman with kind eyes and a sun hat, stands with the children. Aisha, a Black girl in purple overalls, waves enthusiastically. Sam, a child with red hair and freckles, grins widely. Luca stands slightly apart, still looking uncertain.
illustration.alt: Diverse group of children and teacher in school garden

pages.text: "I'm scared to plant seeds," Luca said quietly. Aisha took his hand. "Don't be scared! We'll help you," she said kindly. Sam nodded. "It's fun! The seeds want to grow."

illustration.description: Aisha gently holds Luca's hand while Sam stands close beside them, both children showing encouraging expressions. Luca's face begins to soften from worry to slight hope. The garden background shows rich brown soil in wooden planting boxes with small gardening tools scattered around.
illustration.alt: Friends comforting nervous Luca in the garden

pages.text: Ms. Chen knelt down with a warm smile. "Luca, you can be brave. Start with just one tiny seed. I'll show you how." Luca felt a little bit better and nodded.

illustration.description: Ms. Chen kneels at Luca's eye level, holding a small seed in her palm. Her expression is gentle and reassuring. Luca looks at the seed with growing curiosity, his worried expression beginning to transform into cautious interest. Sunlight filters through the scene creating a warm, encouraging atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Ms. Chen showing Luca a seed encouragingly

pages.text: Luca made a small hole in the soft dirt. He placed one tiny seed inside very carefully. Then he covered it gently with soil. "I did it!" he whispered, feeling proud.

illustration.description: Luca kneels beside a planting box, his small hands carefully covering a seed with dark, rich soil. His expression has changed to concentration and growing confidence. His friends watch nearby with encouraging smiles. The garden setting is bright and inviting with other planted areas visible in the background.
illustration.alt: Luca carefully planting his first seed

pages.text: Aisha and Sam cheered. "You're so brave, Luca!" Ms. Chen smiled big. Luca watered his seed and felt happy inside. He wasn't nervous anymore - he was excited to see his plant grow!

illustration.description: Luca stands proudly holding a small watering can, beaming with joy and confidence. Water droplets sparkle in the sunlight as they fall on the planted soil. Aisha and Sam clap their hands in celebration while Ms. Chen watches with a proud smile. The entire scene radiates happiness and accomplishment with bright, warm colors.
illustration.alt: Happy Luca watering his seed while friends cheer

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Luca feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Luca felt nervous about Garden Day and planting seeds.

questions.question: Who helped Luca feel better?
questions.explanation: His friends Aisha and Sam, along with Ms. Chen, helped Luca feel brave.

questions.question: What did Luca plant in the garden?
questions.explanation: Luca carefully planted a tiny seed in the soil.

questions.question: How did Luca feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Luca felt happy and excited to see his plant grow after successfully planting the seed.

pages.title: Complete the Sentence
pages.instruction: Fill in the missing words from Luca's story!

sentences.text: Aisha and Sam helped Luca feel _____.
When Luca planted his seed, he felt _____.
At the end, Luca was _____ to see his plant grow.
